node.title: Uber System Design Round for SDE - 2 (Fullstack) role

article.title: Uber System Design Round for SDE - 2 (Fullstack) role
article.content:
Has anyone recently appeared fro Uber System design round for SDE 2 fullstack or frontend role?

Can you share your experience?

If anyone has working or has received offer from Uber can they share the structure the interviewer expects in the interviews?

Thanks in advance!

post.content: You can find the Uber frontend interview questions on https://alpha.learnersbucket.com/course-item?item-id=6964de0fdef987b61a484fae
